use_cases: Enable boolean toggle selections in forms and settings
Support multi-select functionality in lists and filtering interfaces
Collect user consent or agreement in registration flows
Mark items as complete or incomplete in task management
Provide granular control options in configuration panels
ai_summary: A lightweight checkbox component built on Radix UI CheckboxPrimitive with Tailwind CSS styling. Features proper focus-visible outlines, disabled cursor states, and dynamic checked styling using primary color. Part of a plan card selection system but functions as a standalone reusable input component with full keyboard navigation and accessibility support.
